title: Design a Contact Form
description: A clean contact form centered on a gradient background. The form container uses a white background with rounded corners and padding. Inputs and textarea share consistent width and padding styling, and the submit button changes background color on hover.
objectives: Center a form container on the page using flexbox on the body
Apply background-color, border-radius, padding, and width to a form container
Style label elements with margin and color
Apply consistent width, padding, and bottom margin to inputs and textarea
Add a button hover effect that changes background color

files.name: index.html
files.content: Contact Us
